TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[157.080-434.930] interviewee: built a new school. Again, the mother language was German. But in the second grade of high school, we had to study Polish. In the third grade, we studied with French. In the fourth grade, English. And only in the first grade, we studied with Latin. I had eight years Latin. I graduated in 1928. And during the whole time of my school years, we were two Jews only. But we never felt
